revision.comment: /* Usage */
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Intricate template}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE --> This template is used to configure the articles found in non-standard sections on Wikipedia Portal main pages; for example, Selected battle. It is used on the article pages that are linked to the Selected (whatever) sub-page, e.g. '''Portal:''Foo''/Selected whatever/1'''. For the quickest and easiest way to create the '''Portal:''Foo''/Selected ''bar''''' sub-page and related article links, use one of the {{tl|Numbered subpages}} templates.
== Template layout == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" width="75%"> {{Selected X | image = | size = | side = | caption = | text = <!--- Required ---> | link = <!--- Required ---> | page = <!--- Required ---> | pageplural = | archive =
}} </syntaxhighlight>
== Usage == It is unnecessary to include braces, quotation marks or other wiki-markup in the template. The '''''|text=''''' field does allow the use of wiki-markup at the contributor's discretion.
* '''image''' - Image relating to the subject of the article. * '''size''' - Set the size of the image here, it will default to 250px if no size is specified. * '''side''' - Set the location of the image here, it will default to left if no side is specified. Use ''right'' or ''center'' as the variable. * '''caption'''- Image caption, if any. * '''text''' - A brief summary of the subject. * '''link''' - Wikilink to the main article about the subject. * '''archive''' - Using this field with a value of ''no'' will remove the '''More selected articles''' link in the lower left corner. * '''page''' - What this is a list of selected things of. For example, if you want to link to '''Portal:Foo/Selected battle''', page = battle. * '''pageplural''' - Used to override simply adding an "s" to the end of "page" to pluralise it. For instance, for '''Portal:Foo/Selected company''', pageplural = companies
== Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Selected X | image = Coq au vin.jpg | size = | caption = Coq au vin | text = '''''Coq au vin''''' is a [[France|French]] [[braise]] of [[Chicken (food)|chicken]] cooked with [[wine]], [[lardon]]s, [[Edible mushrooms|mushroom]]s, and optionally [[garlic]]... | link = Coq au vin | page = food | pageplural = food }} </syntaxhighlight>
Will produce this:
{{Selected X | image = Coq au vin.jpg | size = | caption = Coq au vin | text = '''''Coq au vin''''' is a [[France|French]] [[braise]] of [[Chicken (food)|chicken]] cooked with [[wine]], [[lardon]]s, [[Edible mushrooms|mushroom]]s, and optionally [[garlic]]...
While the wine is typically [[Burgundy wine|Burgundy]], many [[regions of France]] have variants of ''coq au vin'' using the local wine, such as ''coq au vin jaune'' ([[Jura department|Jura]]), coq au Riesling ([[Alsace]]), ''coq au pourpre'' or ''coq au violet'' ([[Beaujolais nouveau]]), ''coq au [[Champagne (wine)|Champagne]]'', and so on. | link = Coq au vin | page = food | pageplural = food }}
== See also == {{Portal template list}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE --> [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[pt:Predefinição:Artigo selecionado]] }}</includeonly>

== Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Selected X | image = Coq au vin.jpg | size = | caption = Coq au vin | text = '''''Coq au vin''''' is a [[France|French]] [[braise]] of [[:en:Chicken (food)|chicken]] cooked with [[wine]], [[lardon]]s, [[:en:Edible mushrooms|mushroom]]s, and optionally [[garlic]]... | link = Coq au vin | page = food | pageplural = food }} </syntaxhighlight>
Will produce this:
{{Selected X | image = Coq au vin.jpg | size = | caption = Coq au vin | text = '''''Coq au vin''''' is a [[France|French]] [[braise]] of [[:en:Chicken (food)|chicken]] cooked with [[wine]], [[lardon]]s, [[:en:Edible mushrooms|mushroom]]s, and optionally [[garlic]]...
While the wine is typically [[Burgundy wine|Burgundy]], many [[regions of France]] have variants of ''coq au vin'' using the local wine, such as ''coq au vin jaune'' ([[Jura department|Jura]]), coq au Riesling ([[Alsace]]), ''coq au pourpre'' or ''coq au violet'' ([[:en:Beaujolais nouveau|Beaujolais nouveau]]), ''coq au [[:en:Champagne (wine)|Champagne]]'', and so on. | link = Coq au vin | page = food | pageplural = food }}

== Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Selected X | image = Coq au vin.jpg | size = | caption = Coq au vin | text = '''''Coq au vin''''' is a [[:en:France|French]] [[:en:Braise|Braise]] of [[:en:Chicken (food)|chicken]] cooked with [[wine]], [[:en:lardon|lardon]]s, [[:en:Edible mushrooms|mushroom]]s, and optionally [[:en:Garlic|Garlic]]... | link = Coq au vin | page = food | pageplural = food }} </syntaxhighlight>
Will produce this:
{{Selected X | image = Coq au vin.jpg | size = | caption = Coq au vin | text = '''''Coq au vin''''' is a [[:en:France|French]] [[:en:Braise|Braise]] of [[:en:Chicken (food)|chicken]] cooked with [[wine]], [[:en:lardon|lardon]]s, [[:en:Edible mushrooms|mushroom]]s, and optionally [[:en:Garlic|Garlic]]...
While the wine is typically [[:en:Burgundy wine|Burgundy]], many [[:en:Regions of France|Regions of France]] have variants of ''coq au vin'' using the local wine, such as ''coq au vin jaune'' ([[:en:Jura department|Jura]]), coq au Riesling ([[:en:Alsace|Alsace]]), ''coq au pourpre'' or ''coq au violet'' ([[:en:Beaujolais nouveau|Beaujolais nouveau]]), ''coq au [[:en:Champagne (wine)|Champagne]]'', and so on. | link = Coq au vin | page = food | pageplural = food }}
== See also == {{Portal template list}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE --> [[Category:Wikipedia Portal templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[pt:Predefinição:Artigo selecionado]] }}</includeonly>
